query:
SELECT externalId, name, businessName, contactEmail, siteAddress, status
FROM customers 
WHERE name LIKE '%Infinitea%' 
   OR name LIKE '%Bel%Resto%' 
   OR name LIKE '%JOSHELLEY%' 
   OR name LIKE '%Josh%Elley%'
   OR name LIKE '%Mother Duck%' 
   OR name LIKE '%SmileTel%'
   OR name LIKE '%Smile IT%'
   OR name LIKE '%Smile Tel%'
   OR name LIKE '%Fremantle%Zambrero%'
   OR name LIKE '%Zambrero%Fremantle%'
   OR businessName LIKE '%Infinitea%'
   OR businessName LIKE '%Bel%Resto%'
   OR businessName LIKE '%JOSHELLEY%'
   OR businessName LIKE '%Mother Duck%'
ORDER BY name
LIMIT 30;
